title: vici2.phone_codes.invalidate Valkey pubsub payload
description: Payload for the vici2.phone_codes.invalidate Valkey pubsub channel. Published by D03 admin handlers after writes to phone_codes_overrides. All services subscribed to this channel reload the affected override row (or the full cache on FULL).

oneOf.description: Full cache reload — all processes call Preload().
Single NXX invalidation — 6 ASCII digits: NPA (3) + NXX (3). Processes reload only this override row from MySQL.
